title: polygala vulgaris proles pseudoalpestris
intro: Polygala vulgaris proles pseudoalpestris, also known as the Alpestris Milkwort, is a plant species within the Polygala genus. The Alpestris Milkwort is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Its roots are valued for their expectorant, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The Alpestris Milkwort can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes.
